DTH platform launches a new broadcast service

The DTH platform launched a new broadcast service for television households across India. The operator said the service includes updated set top box software, improved channel discovery, stronger conditional access, and support for connected television experiences. The company will introduce the service in several cities before expanding availability nationwide. Customers can continue to use their existing subscriptions while compatible receivers receive the upgrade. Industry observers said the announcement may increase competition among satellite, cable, IPTV, and over the top television providers in the Indian broadcasting market.
